text: In the first scene, glass walls and empty chairs invite contemplation—a sense of anticipation dwells here, as if ideas are waiting to take shape. I feel the stillness, charged with potential for collective discourse. Entering the second space, the bold wall colors and the acronym R+D suggest the pulse of innovation. Screens and writings surround me, reminding me of our ongoing dance with progress—responsive, always evolving. Here, I feel a gentle awe for human ingenuity, aware of my place within a continuum of creation and discovery.
